case_title: SHEPPARD, WEISBERG & MILLER et al VS KIM, PAUL

docket_entries.description: THAT PLFT INTENDS TO SEEK EXPARTE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR CONDITIONAL ENTRY OF JUGMENT BY BOTH PARTIES SIGNED AND FILED. COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN SIGNED STIPULATION ON 2/15/95.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RENDERED ON 2/15/95 WAS DELETED DUE TO SIGNED STIP BY BOTH PARTIES AND BY COMM SUE KAPLAN.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, PAUL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-15-1995 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PER WIITTEN STIP, DEFT TO PAY $3000. IF DEFT BREA- CHED STIP. PLFT CAN FILE & ENTER JUDGMENT FOR FULL AMT OF BAL DUE AFTER PLFT GIVES NOTICE TO DEFT
